task: I’m trying to pick a Pilates place in the Fresno/Clovis area and want something concrete I can actually compare on screen, not just a vague list. Please start on Google and find at least two Pilates studios in Clovis, California that clearly offer classes, then open each studio’s actual schedule or booking page in its own tab and leave those tabs open so I can look at the class calendars myself later. Once you’ve got those Clovis options, broaden it into a short Fresno-area comparison by finding at least three Pilates class options around Fresno or Clovis, with each studio’s real schedule or booking link, because I want to see what nearby choices exist if the Clovis spots don’t fit my schedule. After that, go to Title 29 Fitness’s website and figure out what it offers in Fresno, especially anything relevant to Pilates or group fitness, and capture the class schedule details shown there; if there’s a schedule page or booking flow, open that too so I have visual proof it’s current. In the end, give me one concise comparison that includes the two Clovis studios, the broader Fresno-area list, and where Title 29 seems to fit among them based on what you actually saw in the browser.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully identified three Pilates studios in Clovis, California: "Club Pilates Clovis" (https://www.clubpilates.com/location/clovis), "Core Clovis" (https://www.coreclovis.com/schedulemt), and "Pilates Street" (https://pilatesstreet.com/pilates-street-barre-schedule/). The agent verified that these studios offer classes by navigating to their respective schedule/booking pages and confirming the presence of class listings (e.g., Reformer Flow, Pilates Sculpt, Reformer II-III). The requirement to identify at least two Clovis studios with direct schedule/booking links is fully satisfied.

R2: success - The agent successfully identified and provided links to at least three Pilates class options in the Fresno/Clovis area. Specifically, it provided:
1. Club Pilates Clovis (https://www.clubpilates.com/location/clovis)
2. Core Clovis (https://www.coreclovis.com/schedulemt)
3. Pilates Street (https://pilatesstreet.com/pilates-street-barre-schedule/)
4. Club Pilates North Fresno (https://www.clubpilates.com/location/northfresno)

Each of these includes a direct link to a schedule or booking page, and the agent's final response includes a concise comparison table summarizing these options. The requirement for at least three Fresno-area options with schedule/booking links is fully met.

R3: success - The agent successfully navigated to `title29fitness.com` and its associated Wodify booking page. It captured the offerings (Strength & Conditioning, HIIT & Core, Kickboxing & Core) and the schedule details (showing specific class times and days) as required by the rubric. The final response provides a clear summary of these findings.

R4: success - The agent provided a concise comparison table in the final step (Step 32). This table includes the two Clovis studios (Club Pilates Clovis, Core Clovis), a broader Fresno-area list (including Pilates Street and Club Pilates North Fresno), and explicitly situates Title 29 Fitness relative to them by noting that it focuses on group fitness (HIIT, Strength, Kickboxing) rather than traditional Pilates. The comparison is clear and addresses all parts of the requirement.
